raw_text:

    "AB 1259 authorizes the City of Merced to establish an Enhanced Infrastructure Financing District (EIFD).",
    "An EIFD is an economic development tool used by cities to support public infrastructure and economic development projects of community-wide significance.",
    "The City of Merced intends to establish an EIFD to advance the city’s affordable housing goals.",
